summary: Network School signed an MOU with Kazakhstan to open a new campus with expedited visas and active talent recruitment.
evidence: a memorandum of understanding has been signed between the Republic of Kazakhstan and Network School. Our new campus will become a haven for global techno-optimism

summary: Network School put a planned 500M+ MYR Malaysia expansion on hold and signalled it will reallocate capital to other countries absent assurances.
evidence: all further investment we were planning to make in Malaysia is on hold ... we will of course ... reallocate our capital to other countries instead
